title: Fix Race Replay Session Loading: Timeouts, Error Handling, Circuit Lookup

tasks.description: Add fetch timeout: Add AbortController with 30s timeout to all fetchOpenF1 calls to prevent hanging requests from blocking the entire session load
tasks.acceptance: Every fetchOpenF1 call has a 30-second timeout; hanging requests abort cleanly and are retried or caught

tasks.description: Fix worker error handling: Add worker.onerror handler to catch worker load/runtime failures, move worker.onmessage before postMessage to avoid race condition
tasks.acceptance: Worker.onerror sets error state in page; onmessage assigned before postMessage

tasks.description: Add processing status indicator: Show a subtle status bar/badge during isProcessing phase so user knows data is loading, handle empty replay frames gracefully
tasks.acceptance: User sees a processing indicator while worker runs; empty replay frames show a clear message instead of blank UI

tasks.description: Expand circuit lookup table: Add newer F1 circuits (2025 season) to circuit-lookup.ts to prevent SatelliteTrackMap from failing on unknown circuit keys
tasks.acceptance: Newer circuit keys resolve to known locations; SatelliteTrackMap initializes correctly for 2025 season circuits
